positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, gradient sunset sky. The mountain peaks are sharp and clean, rendered in deep indigo and cool slate grey. Foreground elements include a lone stylized geometric campfire and scattered constellations. Use strong linework and flat color blocking with subtle watercolor gradients for the sky. The overall composition is centered and highly symmetrical, designed for high contrast apparel printing. Ambiance is serene and adventurous. Style: Nordic folklore meets contemporary vector art. --ar 1:1 --v 5
